state_snapshot.overall_goal: Fix visual verification failures (black images) and implement 3D wireframe generators for Phase 2 stability.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - SECURITY/TECH: Gemini API key support via UI and Environment variables. - PERFORMANCE: Maintained 0ms blocking latency; implemented immediate line rendering for offscreen capture to bypass buffering. - ARCHITECTURE: Self-contained AliceGeminiClient.h with STB manual build armor (ODR fix). - RENDERING: Corrected 4K -> 512 blit sequence and depth linearization (0.1 - 1000 range mapped to 255-0).
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - Visual Fix: Black dumps were caused by AliceViewer's line buffering not flushing into the 4K FBO. Solved by implementing `drawLineImmediate` using on-the-fly VBOs inside the keyPress handler. - STB Armor: Wrapped `STB_IMAGE_WRITE_IMPLEMENTATION` in a guard to prevent multiple definitions across translation units. - Depth Linearization: Correctly implemented the formula to convert logarithmic GL_DEPTH_COMPONENT32F to linear 0-100 range before 8-bit quantization. - UI Binding: Implemented ImGui input for API key with fatal fallback instructions.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `include/AliceGeminiClient.h`: - Added `drawWireCube` and `drawWireSphere`. - Refactored `keyPress` with a strict FBO binding and draw call sequence. - Added ImGui configuration panel. - Implemented depth linearization in `workerThreadFunc`. - `build/bin/AliceViewer.exe`: Compiled successfully with LLVM/clang-cl.
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - Implemented STB header armor. - Added 3D wireframe generators for cubes and spheres. - Fixed render sequence to ensure geometry is drawn before glReadPixels. - Added depth linearization and API key UI. - Verified build with local Ninja/LLVM toolchain.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Fix STB ODR violations. 2. [DONE] Implement 3D Wireframe Generators. 3. [DONE] Correct Render Sequence for 4K captures. 4. [DONE] Populate Unit Test Scene. 5. [DONE] Implement API Key UI & Depth Linearization. 6. [DONE] Verify Local Build (Ninja/LLVM).
